# Generated by iptables-save v1.8.9 on Tue May 19 09:00:00 2026
# A sloppy edge router, for the linter: INPUT default-denies but forgot the
# conntrack ESTABLISHED rule (drops replies to its own outbound connections)
# and never logs what it drops, FORWARD keeps policy ACCEPT with no catch-all
# (it routes anything), and the MASQUERADE has no source restriction (it NATs
# anything the box forwards, not just the LAN it was meant for).
*filter
:INPUT DROP [0:0]
:FORWARD ACCEPT [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
-A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -s 10.0.0.0/8 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p icmp -j ACCEPT
COMMIT
*nat
:PREROUTING ACCEPT [0:0]
:INPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
:POSTROUTING ACCEPT [0:0]
-A POSTROUTING -o eth0 -j MASQUERADE
COMMIT
